creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Rudolf Polzer from comment #0)
> Thus, I suspect one of two things is the case:
> ...
> vt accidentally changed the meaning of the sequence

This is the likely case. That said, cycles of a 1193182Hz clock makes for a silly unit and I am inclined to make the change in review D46803 rather than "fixing" vt.

Unfortunately it seems my daily driver laptop (Framework 11th gen Intel) does not route the 8254 speaker anywhere so I'm unable to test this locally at the moment.
